zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun於1139年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯洛易時，他的父親Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV29歲，母親Marguerite de Saint-Calais25歲。他於大約1170年與Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1191年在法國艾-吉洛易享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun于1139年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯洛易时，他的父亲Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV29岁，母亲Marguerite de Saint-Calais25岁。他于大约1170年与Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1191年在法国艾-吉洛易享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun was born in 1139, in Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV, was 29 and his mother, Marguerite de Saint-Calais, was 25. He married Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche about 1170. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1191, in Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun est né en 1139, à Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Saint-Calais, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1191, à Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun 1139 in Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV 29 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Saint-Calais 25. Er hat um 1170 Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun è nato il nel 1139 nel Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Saint-Calais, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1191, nel Eure-et-Loir, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudunが1139年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスロイアーで生まれた時，父Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IVは29歳，母Marguerite de Saint-Calaisは25歳であった。約1170年にJeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guercheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun(이)가 1139년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Saint-Calais(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun nasceu em 1139, em Loire, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Saint-Calais, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1191, em Eure-et-Loir, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun родился в 1139 г. в местности лоир, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Saint-Calais, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche около 1170 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun nació en 1139, en Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Saint-Calais, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1191, en Eure-et-Loir, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
